rationale.R1.7: The agent thoroughly audited every citation and flagged specific issues with each one, providing bibliographic precision for the corrections needed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty where appropriate, noting that some citations were verified based on prior knowledge rather than web access.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covered exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional claims.
rationale.RX.4: The output did not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only flagged existing issues in the citations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for each citation audit.
